notes: For um- verbs, the infinitive and completed forms are identical.

examples.tagalog: Gusto ko nang umuwi—pagod na ako.
examples.english: I want to go home already—I am tired.
Go home now before it rains.
She went home early last night.

examples.tagalog: Umuwi na kami pagkatapos ng salu-salo.
examples.english: We already went home after the gathering.

examples.tagalog: Umuuwi siya tuwing alas-singko ng hapon.
examples.english: He goes home every day at five in the afternoon.

examples.tagalog: Umuuwi na ang mga bisita—masaya ang handaan.
examples.english: The guests are going home—the party was fun.

examples.tagalog: Uuwi kami sa probinsya sa katapusan ng buwan.
examples.english: We will go home to the province at the end of the month.
She will go home early tomorrow.
